data.title: Rumble to launch Bitcoin tipping feature in December for 51 million monthly active users
data.description: Video-sharing platform Rumble plans to officially launch Bitcoin tipping in mid-December, making it available to its approximately 51 million monthly active users. Developed in collaboration with Tether, the feature will allow users to send BTC directly to creators through an in-app digital wallet, expanding revenue streams for content creators. The system is currently in testing, with the first Bitcoin tip already sent by a viewer to Canadian creator David Freiheit. The announcement was made at the Plan ₿ forum in Lugano, Switzerland. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Giggle Academy: No tokens or smart contracts have ever been issued
data.description: Giggle Academy has issued a fraud prevention notice, stating that individuals have recently been found impersonating its official and community members to create fake token projects. Officials emphasized that Giggle Academy has never issued any cryptocurrency, tokens, or smart contract addresses, nor has it participated in any investment projects. Giggle Academy stated that its mission is to promote free, high-quality education globally and that it will not solicit funds or app downloads via private messages. The team reminds users to be wary of unidentified links and scams, and to report any suspicious activity immediately to prevent financial loss.

data.title: 45% of US investors say they’re interested in alternative assets like crypto and oil
data.description:
Nearly half of Americans are ditching the old-school playbook. According to a Charles Schwab survey released yesterday, 45% of US investors now say they want to put money into non-traditional assets, and that includes everything from crypto and gold to private equity, real estate partnerships, and hedge funds. The same poll says two-thirds of people […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/45-of-us-investors-interested-in-alt-assets/

data.title: Federal Reserve Likely to Cut Interest Rates in October
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from CME's 'FedWatch' tool indicates a 98.3% probability that the Federal Reserve will reduce interest rates by 25 basis points in October. The likelihood of maintaining the current rates stands at 1.7%.

data.title: Binance hired a close friend of Trump's eldest son to lobby the White House, paying him $450,000 in the past month
data.description: Ches McDowell, a North Carolina lobbyist and close friend of Donald Trump Jr., the eldest son of President Trump, has recently become one of the most active lobbyists in Washington. His firm, Checkmate Government Relations, generated $7.1 million in revenue in the past three months alone. Disclosure documents show that Binance hired McDowell in late September to lobby the White House and Treasury Department on financial policy and "administrative relief" issues, and paid his firm $450,000 in the past month. It has also been reported that CZ had been seeking a pardon even earlier. In February of this year, Binance and CZ each hired cryptocurrency lawyer Teresa Goody Guillén, who was once considered by Trump for appointment as SEC Chair. Her law firm has received a combined $290,000 in fees from Binance and CZ to date. Neither McDowell nor Guillén responded to requests for comment.

data.title: Japan seeks imports of U.S.-built cars via Toyota to ease trade imbalance
data.description:
Toyota Motor is preparing to ship U. S. -built vehicles back to Japan in a move tied to President Donald Trump’s upcoming three-day visit. According to NHK, Toyota will inform Washington of this plan while Trump is in Tokyo. Akio Toyoda, the automaker’s chairman, is expected to be the one delivering the message directly to American officials […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-seeks-imports-of-u-s-built-cars/

data.title: ETH $10K Path Projected by Analyst as Ether Whales and Sharks Show ‘Signs of Confidence’
data.description:
An analyst has projected that Ethereum (ETH) could reach a price of $10,000, citing increasing confidence among significant holders of the cryptocurrency, often referred to as "whales" and "sharks." This optimism is reflected in recent market activities, indicating a growing belief in the potential for Ethereum's value to rise substantially in the near future.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/10/25/eth-usd10k-path-projected-by-analyst-as-ether-whales-and-sharks-show-signs-of-confidence

data.title: The whale with a 100% win rate increased its short position to 666 BTC, with a total holding of $74.43 million.
data.description: According to monitoring by crypto analyst Aunt Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), half an hour ago, the counterparty of the "100% winning whale" had increased its BTC short position to 666 pieces. The current position size is about US$74.43 million, the opening price was US$110,004.1, and the current floating loss is about US$1.17 million.

data.title: Bitcoin is trading at a 30% discount relative to Nasdaq fair value
data.description:
Bitcoin is currently trading at a roughly 30% discount compared to its Nasdaq 100-implied fair value. While any high-conviction Bitcoiner already knows how cheap the asset is right now, this ratio highlights the knock-down BTC price in proportion. And it’s a divergence that has historically implied a deep undervaluation
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitcoin-is-trading-at-a-30-discount-relative-to-nasdaq-fair-value/

data.title: Smart money transferred 10,000 GIGGLE to Binance, with a floating profit of approximately $1.71 million
data.description: According to crypto analyst Aunt Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), the address 0x618…bfc6e transferred all 10,000 GIGGLE tokens it had accumulated between September 27 and October 13 to Binance five hours ago. If sold at the current price, the tokens would have generated a profit of approximately $1.71 million, a 376% return on investment. Furthermore, the address has accumulated approximately $96,000 in profits on Hakimi.
